title: Bannocks O' Barley.
content:
Tune - "The Killogie."



I.

        Bannocks o' bear meal,
            Bannocks o' barley;
        Here's to the Highlandman's
            Bannocks o' barley.
        Wha in a brulzie
            Will first cry a parley?
        Never the lads wi'
            The bannocks o' barley.

II.

        Bannocks o' bear meal,
            Bannocks o' barley;
        Here's to the lads wi'
            The bannocks o' barley.
        Wha in his wae-days
            Were loyal to Charlie?
        Wha but the lads wi'
            The bannocks o' barley?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Burns delivers a powerful performance in "Bannocks O' Barley."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
